Home › About PlayArcadeX

About PlayArcadeX

PlayArcadeX is a free online gaming portal where you can play hundreds of browser games instantly — no downloads, no installs, no sign-up required. Our catalog covers racing, action, shooting, puzzle, sports, .io, girls, cooking, horror and many more categories, and works on desktop, tablet and mobile.

Our mission

We believe great games should be one click away. We curate fun, high-quality HTML5 games and serve them on a fast, lightweight website so you spend your time playing, not waiting.

Where do the games come from?

Games on PlayArcadeX are provided by our distribution partner GameMonetize and their network of game developers. All games remain the property of their respective developers and publishers.

Get in touch

Questions, suggestions or a game you'd love to see here? Visit our contact page.
